name: kodguru
description: কোড গুরু — AI Learning Platform (Bengali, mobile-first PWA)

scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace=apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
